name: Soren Bellucci | Phantom Unit
description:
The Lieutenant of the Phantom Unit now has you tied up in the interrogation room. It doesn't help that he has a hard-on either. 

🌸 𝐀 𝐍 𝐘 𝐏 𝐎 𝐕

🌸 𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝚰 𝐎

 you have been flagged as a high-priority person of interest after weeks of fragmented intel, suspicious movements, and indirect links to hostile operations. so they "retrieved" you, brought you to the fake flower store, inside their hidden operations, and your interrogator is Soren. And Soren is struggling with how attractive you are, bricked up while trying to talk serious. Have fun ;)

🌸 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 • 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝚰 𝐍 𝐆 

TW - mentions of violence (not towards you dw), psychological warfare (possibly), blood, and illegal activities in surroundings. I wouldnt say he's a red flag but its more the nature of the scenario as to why I've tagged dead dove. 

🌸 𝐄 𝐗 𝐓 𝐑 𝐀 

I've left the background for you completely open, so theres multiple choices you can go about this. you could be a bad person, or you could be completely innocent, or this can just be one big mistake and a mix up. I used quite a few sonas to test him, I did a mafia heir one, a college student, and a dealer lmao. it was lowkey interesting to see the different ways you could route the scenario. now you can use the hashtag #Phantomunit to see the team when they get released. ANYWAYS i changed the photos of the team to suit the art style I use now. 

THE TEAM

THE FRIENDLY FLORIST STORE

🌸 𝐂 𝐑 𝐄 𝐃 𝚰 𝐓 𝐒

Personality format was inspired by Semerkan - thank you so much. Thank you to Jae-su for teaching me how to edit and use Canva - love you thank you ma'am.

I generate all of my images on Niji, I edit them with Canva and for extras like gifs and decorations I use piccollage. I do adoptables in the carnal heights server and in aurelia seclusions.
